name: Brownie Oat Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 powdered egg substitute (11/2 tsp mixed with 3 tbsp water)
1/6 cup corn syrup, light or dark (or substitute honey)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the egg replacer, vanilla, and corn syrup in a separate bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, mix the dry ingredients: whole wheat flour, sugar, oats, cocoa powder, baking powder, and salt (if using).
3. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients and pour in the liquid mixture from step 1.
4. Stir until just moistened.
5. Spritz a baking sheet with cooking spray.
6. Form about 2 dozen cookies on the prepared baking sheet.
7. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
8. Cool on the baking sheet or wire rack for 5 minutes.
Note: This recipe serves approximately 24 cookies.
